sectionSubtitle: Every HeadyWeb portal includes the full suite of federated apps — each independently deployable, collaboratively designed, and AI-native from the ground up.

apps.name: HeadyDash
apps.description: The command center for your entire Heady ecosystem. HeadyDash surfaces real-time system health, active agent status, workflow pipeline state, API credit balances, and team activity in a composable, widget-based dashboard. Start here every morning — and never lose sight of what your AI agents are doing.
features: Real-time agent status grid (all 20+ agents)
System health metrics with Grafana-powered charts
API credit balance and usage trends
Workflow pipeline visualization
Team activity feed
Customizable widget layout with drag-drop

apps.name: HeadyChat
apps.description: AI-native messaging for individuals and teams. HeadyChat connects you directly to your Heady companion agents, supports multi-agent conversation threads where different cognitive archetypes respond to different aspects of your query, and integrates with your team for human-AI hybrid collaboration. Every conversation is indexed in your 3D vector memory.
apps.tagline: Conversations with your sovereign AI companion.
features: Multi-agent conversation threads
Cognitive archetype mode selection (Owl, Eagle, Dolphin, etc.)
Persistent conversation memory via 3D vector store
Team channels with AI participants
File and image sharing with AI analysis
Voice input via Whisper transcription

apps.name: HeadyDocs
apps.description: Intelligent documentation and knowledge base powered by AI. HeadyDocs lets your team create, search, and maintain living documentation with AI-assisted writing, automatic table of contents generation, semantic search across all documents, and agent-powered Q&A that answers questions directly from your knowledge base content.
apps.tagline: Knowledge that writes, searches, and answers itself.
features: AI-assisted writing with contextual suggestions
Semantic search across all documents
Agent Q&A — ask questions, get answers from your docs
Automatic table of contents and cross-linking
Version history with semantic diff summaries
Export to PDF, Markdown, Notion, Confluence

apps.name: HeadyFlow
apps.description: Visual workflow automation with AI-native logic. HeadyFlow provides a node-based workflow builder where each step can be a trigger, an AI action, a CSL gate decision, an API call, or a human approval checkpoint. Build multi-step automations that leverage the full 17-Swarm Matrix without writing a line of code.
apps.tagline: Automate anything with the power of the swarm.
features: Visual node-based workflow builder
100+ pre-built action nodes (API, AI, data, logic)
CSL gate decision nodes for intelligent branching
Human-in-the-loop approval checkpoints
Webhook triggers and scheduled runs
Real-time execution monitoring with step-by-step logs

apps.name: HeadyStore
apps.description: The marketplace browser embedded directly in your portal. Browse, preview, and one-click install agent skills, workflow templates, MCP server connections, and UI components from the HeadyStore marketplace — without leaving your workspace. Your installed library syncs across all your devices and team members.
apps.tagline: Install the skills your agents need, instantly.
features: Full HeadyStore marketplace embedded in portal
One-click install for skills, templates, and agents
Personal and team library management
Update notifications for installed packages
Rating and review browser
Private organization store (Business plan)

apps.name: HeadyMetrics
apps.description: Built-in analytics and reporting for your entire Heady operation. HeadyMetrics tracks agent performance, workflow completion rates, user engagement, API cost efficiency, and business KPIs in one unified analytics workspace. Pre-built dashboards for every use case, with a query builder for custom reports and scheduled PDF exports.
apps.tagline: Every decision, backed by data from your AI stack.
features: Pre-built dashboards for agent, workflow, and usage metrics
Custom metric builder with SQL-like query interface
Funnel analysis for workflow completion tracking
API cost and credit usage analytics
Scheduled report delivery via email/Slack
Data export to CSV, JSON, Google Sheets

apps.name: HeadyAdmin
apps.description: Platform administration for operators and IT teams. HeadyAdmin provides centralized user management, role-based access control (RBAC), SSO configuration, API key management, audit logs, billing and subscription management, and system-wide settings for your HeadyWeb portal deployment. The control plane behind the control plane.
apps.tagline: Total control of your Heady deployment.
features: User and team management with RBAC
SSO configuration (SAML 2.0, OIDC)
API key management and rotation
Append-only audit log with Dilithium2 signatures
Billing and subscription management
Organization-wide settings and policy enforcement
